description:
Offered: Spring
This course will take a panoramic view of the economic history of the United States, surveying the course of U.S. history from the early European settlement of the 1600s and 1700s up until the contemporary age of globalization, all from the perspective of and with an emphasis upon the economic matters that informed that history. Cross-listed with HIST 2201
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, CV, HI
